messages: For city photography, is a mid-range zoom lens more practical than juggling a separate wide and tele?
Would you carry a compact umbrella or rely on jacket hoods for unpredictable showers?
Budgeting question: do you prefer setting an absolute daily food limit or a flexible average that allows occasional splurges?
Safety-wise, what's a good daily routine for keeping valuables secure but accessible?
If I want a short hike within reach of the city, what basic water and first-aid should I pack for a couple of hours?
When exploring a new city, what are the common benefits of a guided tour versus wandering on your own?
Do people generally pre-book key attractions or leave most things unplanned to stay flexible?
What's one small cultural habit you wish more travelers knew before visiting somewhere new?
Given the timing on arrival and that I have an appointment the following morning, would you recommend asking for early access to the room or planning to get cleaned up somewhere else first?
I'm juggling a bulky jacket that might push a piece of luggage close to the airline limits I mentioned — what's the safest way to pack it to avoid incurring that extra fee?
For speeding up counters at check-in and at other service desks, is it worth carrying printed copies of reservation details or are screenshots usually fine?

On the morning I'll be going to the conference center, what's the most sensible order: final packing, leaving the accommodation, handling any vehicle returns or transfers, then travel — so I arrive comfortably early?
Because of my serious food allergies, what's a short, unambiguous phrase I can use in restaurants to make sure servers and kitchen staff understand the severity?
If there's a fixed surcharge for overweight luggage, would you generally advise consolidating items into one heavier piece or distributing weight across multiple pieces to reduce cost risk?
When reservations are under the same surname, do staff typically search by reservation name first or prefer seeing a matching photo ID to pull everything up quickly?
Putting all that together — arrival timing, reservations under my name, luggage limits, and dietary restrictions — could you outline a concise arrival-day checklist so I don't miss anything critical?
